title: TrustedShops Shop Profile Scraper
description: Enrich one or more TrustedShops TSIDs or profile URLs with merchant-level shop profile data.

tsids.title: TrustedShops TSIDs
tsids.description: Recommended. Process many TrustedShops IDs in one Apify run. Each successful TSID produces one charged dataset item.

urls.title: TrustedShops Profile URLs
urls.description: TrustedShops profile URLs. The actor extracts TSIDs from URLs when possible, then fetches the shop profile.

tsid.title: Single TSID
tsid.description: Single TrustedShops ID. Prefer TSIDs for batch usage.

url.title: Single Profile URL
url.description: Single TrustedShops profile URL. Prefer URLs for batch usage.

include_raw_response.title: Include Raw Response
include_raw_response.description: Include the full Scrappa TrustedShops shop profile response in each dataset item for debugging or custom field mapping.
